composer.closeDescription: Du har ulagrede endringer. Hva vil du gjøre?

composer.dropToAttach: Slipp filer for å sette inn eller legge ved
composer.flatpakDndDescription: Dra og slipp er ikke tilgjengelig for Flatpak-versjonen av Aerion med mindre du manuelt gir den tilgang til filsystemet ditt.
composer.flatpakDndGrantExample: For eksempel, for å gi Aerion tillatelse til hjem-mappen din, kjør følgene i terminalen din:
composer.flatpakDndSecurityWarning: Det er konsekvenser for sikkerheten din ved å gi en slik tillatelse. Ikke gi ut skile tillatelser uten å forstå hva den gjør.
composer.flatpakDndAlternative: Alternativt så kan du bruke knappene til å sette inn et bilde eller legge ved en fil uten videre konfigurering.
composer.failedToInsertImage: Klarte ikke å sette inn bildet
composer.imageTooLarge: Bildet er for stort (max 10 MB). Legg den ved som et vedlegg i stedet.

composer.cannotEncryptMissingPGPKey: Kan ikke kryptere: mangler PGP-nøkkel for {emails}

composer.missingAttachmentDescription: Din melding nevner et vedlegg, men ingen filer er vedlagt. Vil du likevel sende den?
composer.closeDescription: Hva vil du gjøre med dette utkastet?

settings.title: Settings
settings.composerModeDescription: Choose whether composing opens in the main window or a separate window
settings.mailtoModeDescription: Choose how mailto links from other apps are handled
settings.composerFormatDescription: New messages will use this format by default. You can still switch per message.

settingsGeneral.titleBarHelp: Choose the title bar style (native requires restart)
settingsGeneral.titleBarNativeDesc: Use the OS native title bar (Restart Required)
settingsGeneral.themeHelp: Choose light, dark, or follow system preference
settingsGeneral.messageListDensityHelp: Adjust the spacing and text size in the message list
settingsGeneral.showMessageListCircles: Show colored circles in message list
settingsGeneral.showMessageListCirclesHelp: Show colored circles with sender initials in the message list
settingsGeneral.showViewerCircles: Show colored circles in conversation viewer
settingsGeneral.showViewerCirclesHelp: Show colored circles with sender initials in the conversation viewer
settingsGeneral.accentBarUnreadHelp: Shows a bar on the left side of unread messages for easier identification.
settingsGeneral.readReceiptPolicy: When someone requests a read receipt
settingsGeneral.readReceiptPolicyHelp: Read receipts notify the sender when you've read their message
settingsGeneral.markAsReadHelp: -1 = manual only, 0 = immediate, 0.1-5 = delay in seconds
settingsGeneral.runInBackgroundHelp: Keep Aerion running when the window is closed
settingsGeneral.autostartHelp: Automatically start Aerion when you log in
settingsGeneral.restartRequiredDescription: The title bar change will take effect after restarting Aerion.
settingsGeneral.alwaysLoadImagesHelp: Disables image blocking for all emails. Remote images will load automatically.
settingsGeneral.alwaysLoadImagesWarningDescription: Loading remote images automatically can expose your IP address, confirm when you read an email, and allow tracking by senders. Are you sure you want to disable image blocking?

account.addDescription: Connect your email account to start receiving messages.
account.editDescription: Manage your email account settings, identities, and signatures.
account.colorHelp: Color is used to identify this account in unified inbox
account.displayNameHelp: Name shown to email recipients (can be customized per email address in Identity tab)
account.syncIntervalHelp: How often to check for new messages
account.folderSyncHelp: Control which folders are automatically synced beyond the core folders.
account.manageFolderSyncHelp: When enabled, choose which folders sync automatically. When disabled, only Inbox, Drafts, and Sent are synced.
account.folderMappingHelp: Map IMAP folders to special folder types
account.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name} ({email})?
account.deleteWarning: This will permanently remove all local messages, folders, and settings for this account. Your emails on the server will not be affected.
account.chooseProviderHelp: Select your provider for automatic configuration
account.syncPeriodHelp: How far back to sync messages
account.checkNewMailHelp: How often to check for new messages (IDLE push is also used when available)
account.requestReadReceiptsHelp: When to request read receipts for outgoing messages
account.folderMappingHelp2: Map folder types to specific IMAP folders on your server.
account.redirectToSignIn: You'll be redirected to sign in securely
account.notesGoogle: Sign in with Google or use an App Password
account.notesFastmail: Use App Password from Settings > Privacy & Security
account.oauthFreshToken: Your account has a fresh OAuth token
account.reauthorizeHelp: If you're having sync issues, try re-authorizing to get a fresh token
account.signInAgainHelp: Sign in again to refresh credentials if needed
account.usernameHelp: Leave empty to use email address
account.trustedCertsHelp: Manually trusted TLS certificates for this account's servers.
account.noTrustedCerts: No manually trusted certificates for this account's servers.
account.removeTrustedCertDescription: This certificate will no longer be trusted. Future connections to this server may require you to accept the certificate again.

identity.title: Identities
identity.name: Name
identity.emailAddressesHelp: Manage email addresses you can send from and their signatures
identity.cannotDeleteDefault: Cannot delete the default email address
identity.failedToSetDefault: Failed to set default email address
identity.defaultHelp: Click the circle to set an email address as the default for new messages. The default address cannot be deleted.
identity.editEmailDescription: Update this email address and its signature settings.
identity.addEmailDescription: Add a new email address you can send from.
identity.signatureHelp: You can paste HTML content or add images via URL or file upload
identity.plainTextPlaceholder: Plain text version for text-only emails...
identity.plainTextHelp: Used when sending plain text emails
identity.sharedMailboxesHelp: Add Microsoft 365 shared mailboxes you have access to.

security.noPGPKeysHelp: No PGP keys imported. Import an ASCII-armored (.asc) or binary (.gpg) key file to enable PGP signing and encryption.
security.policyOverrideHint: You can override this per-message in the composer.
security.encryptRequiresRecipientKeys: You can override this per-message in the composer. Encryption requires recipient public keys.
security.encryptRequiresRecipientCerts: You can override this per-message in the composer. Encryption requires recipient certificates.
security.keyServersHelp: Add key servers to search for recipient PGP keys. Servers are queried in order during key lookups.
security.noRecipientPGPKeysHelp: No recipient keys collected yet. Keys are automatically saved when you receive PGP-signed messages, discovered via WKD or key servers, or imported manually.
security.noSMIMECertsHelp: No certificates imported. Import a PKCS#12 (.p12/.pfx) certificate to enable message signing.
security.noRecipientCertsHelp: No recipient certificates collected yet. Certificates are automatically saved when you receive signed messages, or you can import them manually.
security.certificatePasswordPlaceholder: Enter the password for this .p12 file
security.certificatePasswordHelp: The password used when the certificate was exported.
security.recipientEmailHelp: The email address of the person this certificate belongs to.
security.recipientEmailHelpKey: The email address of the person this key belongs to.
security.keyPassphrasePlaceholder: Enter passphrase if the key is encrypted
security.keyPassphraseHelp: Leave blank if the private key is not passphrase-protected.
security.enterRecipientEmail: Please enter the recipient email address
security.failedToSetDefaultPGPKey: Failed to set default PGP key
security.failedToUpdatePGPSignPolicy: Failed to update PGP signing policy
security.failedToUpdatePGPEncryptPolicy: Failed to update PGP encryption policy
security.failedToRemoveRecipientPGPKey: Failed to remove recipient PGP key
security.pgpKeyFound: PGP key found and imported for {email}
security.certEmailMismatch: The certificate email does not match this account or any of its aliases.
security.keyEmailMismatch: The key email does not match this account or any of its aliases.
security.certImportFailed: Failed to import certificate. Check the file format and password.
security.keyImportFailed: Failed to import key. Check the file format and passphrase.
security.recipientCertImportFailed: Failed to import recipient certificate. Check the file format.
security.recipientKeyImportFailed: Failed to import recipient key. Check the file format.
security.berConversionMessage: This certificate uses legacy BER encoding which requires conversion to the standard DER format before import. The conversion is lossless and does not alter the certificate data. Would you like to proceed?

contactSource.title: Contact Sources
contactSource.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this contact source? This will remove all synced contacts from this source.
contactSource.deleteConfirmName: Delete "{name}"? This will remove all synced contacts from this source.
contactSource.name: Name
contactSource.serverUrlHelp: Enter the server URL or full CardDAV addressbook URL
contactSource.noAddressbooksFound: No addressbooks found at this URL
contactSource.fillUrlUserPass: Please fill in URL, username, and password
contactSource.signInDifferent: Sign in with a different account
contactSource.waitingForSignIn: Waiting for sign-in... Check your browser

certificate.title: Untrusted Certificate
certificate.description: The server presented a certificate that could not be verified.
certificate.subject: Subject:

terms.title: Terms of Use & Privacy Policy
terms.description: Please review and accept our terms to continue using Aerion.
terms.content: These documents explain how the application handles your data and the terms under which you may use this software.
terms.agreeLabel: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy

dialog.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the selected message(s). This action cannot be undone.
dialog.emptyTrashDescription: This will permanently delete all messages in the Trash folder. This action cannot be undone.

attachment.flatpakOpenDescription: Opening a file from this toast notification does not work properly in Flatpak. For this functionality to work properly, grant Aerion access to your home directory by running the following in your terminal:
attachment.flatpakOpenSecurityWarning: There are security implications to granting such permission. Do not grant such permission without fully understanding what it does.
attachment.flatpakOpenAlternative: Alternatively, without any further configurations, you can click on "Show in Folder" instead to show the folder that the file is located in so that you can open it from there.

images.noAddresses: No addresses in the allowlist. Use "Always Load > For sender" in the email viewer to add addresses.
images.noDomains: No domains in the allowlist. Use "Always Load > For domain" in the email viewer to add domains.
